case_title: BIRMINGHAM, KAREN vs. GONZALEZ, CARLOS et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, CARLOS GONZALEZ, ROSA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIRMINGHAM, KAREN SERVED AUG-31-1995, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIRMINGHAM, KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, CARLOS GONZALEZ, ROSA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1772 QUESADA AVE, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. CCP 415.46.
